steps.title: Find the sentence's main verb
steps.content: The main clause already has the finite verb adapted: the scientists adapted the mirror test. The blank sits inside a supplementary phrase modifying scientists.

steps.title: Reject extra finite verbs
steps.content:
• Choice A: Searched is a second finite verb with no connector.
  • Choice C: Were searching is also finite and cannot fit inside the modifier.
  • Choice D: Have searched creates the same second-verb problem.

steps.title: Use a participial modifier
steps.content: Only a nonfinite present participle can describe what the scientists were doing while leaving adapted as the sentence's main verb. The answer is B.
